title: Calibration Run
scientificQuestion: Can a concrete temporal evaluation instrument separate true temporal fragility candidates from baseline, leakage, horizon, window, shuffle, replay, and low-risk control cases?
disclaimer: Bounded temporal evaluation tooling result only. No discovery validation, external validation, broad autonomous-intelligence claim, prize-level claim, breakthrough claim, legal/medical/wet-lab/unsafe capability, universal-validity claim, or external adoption is claimed.
